steps.title: Read the slope direction from the graph
steps.content: The line of best fit goes downward from left to right — the slope is negative. Eliminate A (positive 10.95) and B (positive 0.79).

steps.title: Estimate the magnitude
steps.content:
Pick two points from the line: a typical line over a wide $x$-range with moderate $y$-change gives a slope close to $-0.79$, not $-10.95$ (which would be very steep).

That confirms C is correct.
